query_normalized: the impact of bounded confidence on opinion polarization speed psychology
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) because it explicitly implements and parameterizes the "Bounded Confidence" model (specifically the XY variant) to study the mechanisms of "opinion polarization," directly addressing the core theoretical construct and domain of the user's question.
